title: The Friendship
levelGoal: Build a flying vessel capable of delivering the King's treaty to the Kingdom of Zephyr, and successfully receive their reply. Then relocate the abandoned schoolhouse. Finally, build a lighting system for houses and the village paths and streets.

startingInventory.name: SuperFavor Jewel
startingInventory.description: A radiant, multi-faceted gem of immense political power.
startingInventory.descriptionMd: A **SuperFavor Jewel**. Emits a faint, warm glow. Presenting this to any royal official guarantees one massive favor, no questions asked. Use it wisely.

startingInventory.name: 25 Gold Coins
startingInventory.descriptionMd: A velvet pouch clinking with **25 Gold Coins**. Highly valued by merchants and royalty for large-scale purchases.

startingInventory.name: 15 Silver Coins
startingInventory.descriptionMd: **15 Silver Coins**. Perfect for hiring skilled labor or buying specialized tools.

startingInventory.name: 600 Copper Bits
startingInventory.description: Small change for everyday village trades.
startingInventory.descriptionMd: A heavy sack containing **600 Copper Bits**. Essential for bribing children, buying small scraps, or tipping the tavern keep.

startingInventory.name: Precision Brass Calipers
startingInventory.descriptionMd: A set of **Precision Brass Calipers**. Essential for taking exact measurements of gears, blueprints, and materials to ensure physical inventions fit perfectly.
